title: dalea mollis
intro: Dalea mollis, also known as velvet prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids, including dalein and daleinone, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dalea mollis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, from fever reduction to digestive issues.
